title: Sample Topic for Testing and Reference
summary: A complete sample .Plan.json bundle demonstrating every field the V4 schema supports. Use as a reference for creating new plans, as a test fixture for CLI command verification, or as documentation of the bundle format.
goals: Demonstrate all V4 bundle fields with realistic values. Serve as a test fixture for uni-plan CLI commands.
non_goals: This is not a real plan. Do not execute phases or record real evidence against it.
acceptance_criteria: All uni-plan CLI commands can read, query, mutate, and validate this bundle without errors.
problem_statement: New users and AI agents need a reference bundle showing the complete V4 schema with realistic data.
execution_strategy: Phase 0 is completed (reference data). Phase 1 is in_progress with partial job completion. Phase 2 is not_started (ready for phase start gate testing).
next_actions: Continue phase 1 execution, then start phase 2.

phases.scope: Foundation — establish project structure and core types
phases.output: Core type definitions, build system, initial test harness
phases.done: All core types defined, build passes, initial tests green

lanes.exit_criteria: All domain types compile and serialize
cmake build passes on all targets

tasks.description: Create FTopicBundle struct with all fields
Create FPhaseRecord with lifecycle and design sub-structs
tasks.notes: Split into FPhaseLifecycle + FPhaseDesignMaterial per SOLID

jobs.exit_criteria: Serialize → deserialize → re-serialize produces identical JSON

testing.action: Review type definitions for SOLID compliance
testing.expected: No god structs, proper domain typing

file_manifest.description: Core domain types for V4 bundle model
JSON serializer and deserializer for FTopicBundle
Add new source files to build target

phases.investigation: Evaluated nlohmann/json vs rapidjson. Chose nlohmann for ergonomic C++17 API and header-only inclusion. Performance is sufficient for plan bundles (< 1MB each).
phases.code_entity_contract: FTopicBundle: topic key + status + metadata + phases + changelogs + verifications. FPhaseRecord: scope + output + lifecycle + design + lanes + jobs + testing + manifest.
phases.best_practices: SOLID: single-responsibility sub-structs (FPhaseLifecycle, FPhaseDesignMaterial). Domain types: ETopicStatus, EExecutionStatus enums instead of raw strings.

phases.scope: CLI commands — implement query and mutation commands
phases.done: Query commands implemented (topic list/get, phase list/get)
phases.agent_context: Working on wave 1 — semantic lifecycle commands. W0 query commands are done.

lanes.exit_criteria: All read-only commands produce valid JSON and human output
All write commands enforce gates and produce valid mutation JSON

jobs.scope: Implement topic list and topic get
Implement phase list and phase get

jobs.output: Semantic lifecycle commands with gate enforcement
jobs.exit_criteria: Gates reject invalid transitions with clear error messages

tasks.description: Implement RunPhaseStartCommand with not_started + design gate

phases.investigation: Reviewed agent workflows in FIE repo to identify which commands agents compose most frequently. Found 3-5 raw set commands per workflow step — motivated semantic commands.
phases.code_entity_contract: 18 Run*Command functions: 6 phase lifecycle + 3 topic lifecycle + 2 evidence + 4 query + 3 entity coverage.
phases.best_practices: Gate enforcement: hard errors, no --force bypass. Auto-changelog on all mutations. Auto-cascade topic status.

phases.scope: Unit tests — comprehensive test coverage for all CLI commands
phases.output: Test executable with fixtures and per-command assertions

lanes.exit_criteria: Test framework integrated, CMake test target builds
Every Run*Command function has at least one positive and one negative test

changelogs.change: Phase 0 completed: foundation types and build system
Phase 1 progress: query commands done, starting mutations

verifications.detail: Serialize → deserialize → re-serialize produces byte-identical output
